subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from the Primal Point unto him who hath believed in God and journeyed toward the Prison until he entered therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه الاولی الی الذی آمن بالله و سافر الی شطر السجن الی ان دخل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @chastisement and requital, @blind imitation [taqlid]
